question: Will Apple release a new iMac before July 1, 2026?
textDescription:
Resolution criteria

This market resolves to YES if Apple Inc. officially releases a new model of the iMac (e.g., a new generation or a major internal hardware refresh) to the general public before 12:00 AM UTC on July 1, 2026. Otherwise, it resolves to NO.

The resolution will be based on official announcements from Apple's newsroom (https://www.apple.com/newsroom/). A simple cosmetic update, color change, or discontinued product does not count as a new model. If the announcement occurs before the deadline, but the product is not available for purchase until after the deadline, it still counts as YES.
